variables.name: DE_ACTIVE
variables.description: Taking an active role in my own health care is the most important factor in determining my health and ability to function

variables.name: DE_ALCOHOL
variables.description: Do you currently drink alcohol at the recommended daily amount (less than or equal to 2 glasses of wine or beer; or 1 shot of liquor)?

variables.name: DE_ANXIOUS
variables.description: Answering the questions made me anxious

variables.name: DE_AWARE
variables.description: I am more aware of my health risks

variables.name: DE_BACON
variables.description: Bacon or breakfast sausage

variables.name: DE_BEANS
variables.description: Beans such as baked beans; pinto; kidney; or lentils (not green beans)

variables.name: DE_BEEF
variables.description: Beef or pork; such as steaks; roasts; ribs; or in sandwiches

variables.name: DE_CEREAL
variables.description: Fiber cereals like Raisin Bran; Shredded Wheat; or Fruit-n-Fiber

variables.name: DE_CHANGES
variables.description: I am confident that I can maintain lifestyle changes; like diet and exercise; even during times of stress

variables.name: DE_CHEESE
variables.description: Cheese; cheese spread (not low-fat)

variables.name: DE_CHICKEN
variables.description: Fried Chicken

variables.name: DE_CHIPS
variables.description: Corn chips; potato chips; popcorn; crackers

variables.name: DE_COLD_CUT
variables.description: Cold cuts; lunch meats; ham (not low-fat)

variables.name: DE_CONFIDENT
variables.description: I am confident that I can take actions that will help prevent or minimize some symptoms or problems associated with my health

variables.name: DE_DARK_BREAK
variables.description: Dark bread such as whole wheat or rye

variables.name: DE_DID_NOT_TAKE
variables.description: Over the past 7 days; I did not take a dose of my medicine.

variables.name: DE_DISCUSSION
variables.description: How satisfied are you with the discussion you had with your doctor about your risk for colon and breast or ovarian cancer; cardiovascular disease; and diabetes?

variables.description: Please answer these questions about DISCUSSIONS WITH YOUR DOCTOR AT OR SINCE YOU ENROLLED IN THE STUDY (check all apply). Breast magnetic resonance imaging (MRI)

variables.description: Please answer these questions about DISCUSSIONS WITH YOUR DOCTOR AT OR SINCE YOU ENROLLED IN THE STUDY (check all apply). Genetic counseling

variables.description: Please answer these questions about DISCUSSIONS WITH YOUR DOCTOR AT OR SINCE YOU ENROLLED IN THE STUDY (check all apply). Healthy eating and/or exercise

variables.name: DE_DOCTOR
variables.description: I am confident I can tell a doctor concerns I have even when he or she does not ask

variables.name: DE_DONUTS
variables.description: Donuts; pastries; cake; cookies (not low-fat)

variables.name: DE_EASY_TO_UNDERSTAND
variables.description: The questions were easy to understand

variables.name: DE_EASY_TO_USE
variables.description: The MeTree program was easy to use

variables.name: DE_EATING
variables.description: Which of the following describes your behavior for healthier eating?

variables.name: DE_EGGS
variables.description: Eggs (not Egg Beaters or just egg whites)

variables.name: DE_EXERCISE
variables.description: Which of the following describes your behavior for exercise?

variables.name: DE_EXPERIENCE
variables.description: How satisfied are you with your experience using the web-based portal to enter information for your provider before your appointment?

variables.name: DE_FAMILY
variables.description: The family history form used to help collect information was helpful

variables.name: DE_FOLLOW
variables.description: I am confident that I can follow through on medical treatments I may need to do at home

variables.name: DE_FRIES
variables.description: French fries; fried potatoes

variables.name: DE_FRUIT
variables.description: How often do you eat any fruit; fresh or canned (not counting juice)

variables.name: DE_FRUIT_JUICE
variables.description: Fruit juice; like orange; apple; grape; fresh; frozen or canned (not sodas or other drinks)

variables.name: DE_GENERAL_HEALTH
variables.description: In general; would you say your health is:

variables.name: DE_HAMBURGER
variables.description: Hamburgers; ground beef; meat burritos; tacos

variables.name: DE_HANDLE
variables.description: I am confident that I can tell when I need to go get medical care and when I can handle a health problem myself

variables.name: DE_HOT_DOG
variables.description: Hot dogs; or Polish or Italian sausages

variables.name: DE_ICE_CREAM
variables.description: Ice cream (not sherbet or non-fat)

variables.name: DE_INFORMATION
variables.description: I didn't have enough information about some people in my family when completing MeTree

variables.name: DE_KNOW
variables.description: I know what each of my prescribed medications do

variables.name: DE_LEARNED
variables.description: I learned a lot about my family's health history that I did not know

variables.name: DE_LEISURE_TIME
variables.description: Please check the box next to the one statement that best describes the way you spent your leisure time during most of the last year.

variables.name: DE_MAINTAIN
variables.description: I have been able to maintain the lifestyle changes for my health that I have made

variables.name: DE_MARGARINE
variables.description: Margarine; butter; or mayo on bread or potatoes

variables.name: DE_METREE_COMPLETION_Attempted to improve your over
variables.description: Please tell us what you had done since you completed MeTree(C) (check all apply). Attempted to improve your overall health through diet and exercise

variables.name: DE_METREE_COMPLETION_Scheduled or had screening for
variables.description: Please tell us what you had done since you completed MeTree(C) (check all apply). Scheduled or had screening for breast; ovarian; colon cancer

variables.name: DE_METREE_COMPLETION_Started new medications to tre
variables.description: Please tell us what you had done since you completed MeTree(C) (check all apply). Started new medicatin to treat or prevent disease

variables.name: DE_METREE_COMPLETION_Talked with relatives about th
variables.description: Please tell us what you had done since you completed MeTree(C) (check all apply). Talked with relatives about the report and the health risks that run in your family

variables.name: DE_METREE_COMPLETION_Wanted to have screening or re
variables.description: Please tell us what you had done since you completed MeTree(C) (check all apply). Wanted to have screening or referral recommended by MeTree(C) but insurance would not cover it

variables.name: DE_MILK
variables.description: Whole milk

variables.name: DE_MISSED_MEDICATION
variables.description: Over the past 7 days; I missed my medication.

variables.name: DE_OPTIONS
variables.description: I know the different medical treatment options available for my health conditions

variables.name: DE_OTHER_VEGETABLES
variables.description: Any other vegetables; including string beans; peas; corn; broccoli; or any other kind

variables.name: DE_PAST_SCREENING_Colonoscopy
variables.description: In the past year; have you had any of the cancer screening tests below? Colonoscopy

variables.name: DE_PAST_SCREENING_Digital rectal exam
variables.description: In the past year; have you had any of the cancer screening tests below? Digital rectal exam

variables.name: DE_PAST_SCREENING_Mammography
variables.description: In the past year; have you had any of the cancer screening tests below? Mammography

variables.name: DE_PAST_SCREENING_Prostate blood test- often cal
variables.description: In the past year; have you had any of the cancer screening tests below? Prostate blood test - often called PSA

variables.name: DE_PAST_SCREENING_Stool blood test- often called
variables.description: In the past year; have you had any of the cancer screening tests below? Stool blood test- often called fecal occult blood test or FOBT

variables.name: DE_PERSON
variables.description: When all is said and done; I am the person who is responsible for managing my health

variables.name: DE_PHYSICAL_ACTIVITY
variables.description: Please check the box next to the one statement that best describes the kinds of physical activity you usually performed while on the job this last year. If you are not gainfully employed outside the home but perform work around the home regularly; indicate that activity in this section.

variables.name: DE_PIZZA
variables.description: Pizza

variables.name: DE_PLAN_SCREENING_Colonoscopy
